conversations.content: Create a new github repository named new_project, and invite all collaborators in emmajohnson/image_transformation as the collaborators.

<function_thought>
I need to create a new GitHub repository named "new_project" first. Once that step is completed, I can then retrieve the collaborator information from the "emmajohnson/image_transformation" repository to invite them to the newly created repository. I'll proceed with the first function call to create the repo.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_create_repo(repo_name="new_project")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
